title: FlashLead CRM
description: A comprehensive CRM platform built for sales teams to manage leads, track communications, and automate follow-ups across web and mobile.
highlights: Cross-platform mobile app with React Native
Web dashboard built with React JS

title: E-Commerce Mobile App

title: Task Management Dashboard

title: Healthcare Booking App
